entries.title: fix elastic age handling in job list
entries.author: ArielZhu
businessUpdates: align job list age boundary handling
Align duliday_job_list age mismatch handling with precheck ageBoundary semantics.
Add job-list age screening metadata and markdown guidance so boundary ages such as 52 vs 20-50 are not treated as no-match.
Add regression coverage for the 52-year-old boundary case.
fix elastic age handling in job list

entries.title: 修正托管用户统计日期范围
entries.author: huajune
businessUpdates: Added a shared web date-range utility for local date key formatting and recent business-day ranges.
Updated dashboard and user trend charts to use the shared business-day range and exclude weekends from the displayed trend range.
Changed the managed-user list request so the default view queries today's managed sessions without sending a rolling `days` parameter.
Restored the managed-user tab label to “今日托管会话” to match the default query scope.
修正托管用户统计日期范围
summary: 修正托管用户统计日期范围
Added a shared web date-range utility for local date key formatting and recent business-day ranges.
Updated dashboard and user trend charts to use the shared business-day range and exclude weekends from the displayed trend range.
Changed the managed-user list request so the default view queries today's managed sessions without sending a rolling `days` parameter.
Restored the managed-user tab label to “今日托管会话” to match the default query scope.
fixes: Added a shared web date-range utility for local date key formatting and recent business-day ranges.
Updated dashboard and user trend charts to use the shared business-day range and exclude weekends from the displayed trend range.
Changed the managed-user list request so the default view queries today's managed sessions without sending a rolling `days` parameter.
Restored the managed-user tab label to “今日托管会话” to match the default query scope.

verification: `web` build via `tsc -b && vite build` before commit
